scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:api & pnpm run dev:web
scripts.project:setup: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @legacy/api exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @legacy/api exec prisma db push --force-reset && pnpm --filter @legacy/api exec prisma db seed
scripts.project:validate: pnpm --filter @legacy/api exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @legacy/web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @legacy/web run build
